holdings.infoBox: PBPH is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 15.12%, Johnson & Johnson at 9.08%, AbbVie at 6.29%, Novartis AG at 4.63%, and Roche Holding AG at 4.61%.

overview.description: The Portfolio Building Block World Pharma and Biotech Index ETF (PBPH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a rules-based index of healthcare companies that derive at least 50% of their revenue from pharmaceutical and/or biotechnology activities. Securities are selected using BITAs thematic methodology and weighted by market cap. PBPH was launched on Nov 24, 2025 and is issued by Portfolio Building Block.
infoTable: BITA Global Pharma and Biotech Select Index
